_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of lawful bases for data processing under applicable regulations, including consent requirements, contractual necessity, legal obligations, vital interests, public task authority, and legitimate interest balancing tests.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-K-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-T-010 (AB, cosine: 0.512), RC-K-014 (RC, cosine: 0.512).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.5/10 (raw 0.453). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [electronic, evidence, law] vs WIDAI-only terms [applicable, authority, balancing, bases, consent, contractual] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.874 (P=0.921, R=0.831). P exceeds R by 0.089 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 27 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Knowledge of electronic evidence law." and "Knowledge of lawful bases for data processing under applicable regulations, incl" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.516 > STS 0.453 (gap +0.063). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.7%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [electronic, evidence, law]. WIDAI-only: [applicable, authority, balancing, bases, consent, contractual].
